programme.title: Falling for Vermont
programme.desc: When a best-selling author decides to escape the media, her plan goes awry when she's caught in a thunderstorm and crashes her car. She wakes up with no memory of who she is.

programme.title: My Secret Valentine
programme.desc: A young woman takes advice from the chalkboard notes that her mysterious house rental tenant leaves when a slick sales rep arrives with plans to buy her family' prized winery. Stars Lacey Chabert, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The Irresistible Blueberry Farm
programme.desc: Ellen Branford, a high-powered attorney, finds love, purpose, and the promise of a simpler life when she sets off on a journey to fulfill her grandmother's dying wish, to find the boy she once loved and give him her last letter.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: A Chocolate Chip Cookie Mystery
programme.desc: Free spirited cookie baker Hannah Swensen jumps in to help a handsome new detective track down the culprit and uncover the mystery surrounding the death of her friend and local milk delivery man. Stars Alison Sweeney.

programme.title: Summer Villa
programme.desc: A romance novelist with writer's block and a celebrity chef suffering from a bad review accidentally end up staying at the same French villa for the summer. A connection grows as they attempt to share the house.

programme.title: Unthinkably Good Things
programme.desc: Three best friends reunite in Tuscany making important decisions on life & love. Starring Karen Pittman, Erica Ash, Joyful Drake, Luca Seta and Lance Gross.

programme.title: Roadhouse Romance
programme.desc: Country music fan Callie is determined to continue her late grandfather's legacy. While TV director Luke is in town, he teaches her that sometimes it's best to look forward instead of back. Stars Lauren Alaina and Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: 3 Bed, 2 Bath, 1 Ghost
programme.desc: A 1920's ghost refuses to leave estate agent Anna's newly listed home. Worse, the spirit is convinced she cannot "pass over" until she gets Anna back together with her ex. Stars Julie Gonzalo, Chris McNally, Madeleine Arthur.

programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: Jamie learns that her first love Sawyer is the architect of a development that wants to change her beloved neighborhood and threatens her bookstore. Can old Valentines help them see eye to eye? Starring Maggie Lawson and Sam Page.

programme.title: Sweet Carolina
programme.desc: Marketing executive, Josie, returns home when she becomes the unexpected guardian of her niece and nephew. While there, she reconnects with Cooper, her high school boyfriend. Stars Lacey Chabert, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: The Christmas Secret
programme.desc: Christine Eisley is a single mom of two struggling to keep her family afloat during Christmas. As the holidays progress, she comes to find her struggles are replaced by good fortune.

programme.title: Royal Matchmaker
programme.desc: A NYC matchmaker is hired by a king to find his son a suitable wife in time for a celebration. As the clock ticks towards the deadline, he finds him the perfect wife, only to realize that she's fallen in love with him.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil
programme.desc: After discovering a long-lost painting, museum curator Avery and new board member Peter investigate the artwork's origins as they plan a gala to unveil it. Stars Lacey Chabert, Kevin McGarry, Autumn Reeser, Alison Sweeney.

programme.title: The Lost Valentine
programme.desc: Susan Allison, TV reporter, receives a sentimental news assignment: the story of Caroline Thomas, who has waited 60 years for her pilot husband; declared missing in action during World War II, to return to her.

programme.title: Love Under the Stars
programme.desc: When a 30-something woman living in an infinite state of youth is finally forced out into the real world, she befriends a young girl and a widower that will teach her that it is okay to grow up. Stars Ashley Newbrough.

programme.title: Winter Love Story
programme.desc: When author Cassie's first novel isn't selling, she is paired on a book tour with author Elliot to boost Cassie's sales - but along the way a romance starts to blossom. Stars Jen Lilley, Kevin McGarry, and Mary-Margaret Humes.

programme.title: Once Upon a Prince
programme.desc: Susanna accepts help one day from handsome stranger Nate. Sparks between them fly, but when a photo of them gets leaked to the press, Susanna is in for a shock when she discovers he's about to become King Nathaniel of Cambria.

programme.title: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Molly runs the very popular Bridal Boot Camp, helping prospective brides-to-be get in shape, for their big day. But things get complicated when she meets Nick, the fiancé of one of her clients and sparks fly.

programme.title: The Perfect Bride: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Newly engaged Nick and Molly have six weeks to plan the wedding of their dreams. Things get even more complicated when Steven, who once left Molly at the altar, comes back into her life with a business offer.

programme.title: The Color of Rain
programme.desc: When Gina loses her husband on Christmas Day, she soon finds a kindred spirit in another parent at her kids' school, Michael, who loses his wife at the same time. Stars Lacey Chabert and Warren Christie.

programme.title: An Unexpected Valentine
programme.desc: A chance encounter on Valentine's Day brings Hannah and Finn together as they race through New York City to return a lost engagement ring and save one couple's special day. Stars Lacey Chabert, Robert Buckley.

programme.title: Lost in Paradise
programme.desc: When the founder of a high-end fashion company gets marooned on an "deserted" island with a chef, romance blossoms as they work together to survive. Starring Lacey Chabert and Ian Harding.

programme.title: Missing the Boat
programme.desc: Strangers Kelly and Parker both end up on the same Italian cruise, but after missing the boat during a stop, they're forced to team up and race across southern Italy to catch up. Stars Emilie Ullerup and Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: It Was Always You
programme.desc: Elizabeth's engagement plans are thrown into disarray when her fiancé's free-spirited brother David returns home. David's unexpected influence prompts Elizabeth to question her life decisions. Stars Erin Krakow, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: Maddie is doing everything she can to save her cupcake business. With the help of a handsome investment banker, Maddie's luck begins to turn around in all aspects of her life. But then her first love Nate unexpectedly returns.

programme.title: To Barcelona, With Love
programme.desc: Erica, an American translator, secretly revises a novel set in Barcelona. Everything is fine until bookstore owner Nico invites the credited author, Anna, to the city for a book-signing. Stars Alison Sweeney, Ashley Williams.

programme.title: To Barcelona, Forever
programme.desc: As Anna travels back to Barcelona, reuniting with Erica to celebrate her engagement to Nico, she meets a charming farmer and accidentally finds herself "engaged" to save his family's legacy. Stars Ashley Williams, Alison Sweeney.

programme.title: Under the Autumn Moon
programme.desc: When an executive convinces her boss that a ranch would be perfect for their company retreats, he agrees to let her check it out. Her plan hits a snag when the owner refuses to sell unless she can promise to preserve its history.

programme.title: 3 Bed, 2 Bath, 1 Ghost
programme.desc: A 1920's ghost refuses to leave estate agent Anna's newly listed home. Worse, the spirit is convinced she cannot "pass over" until she gets Anna back together with her ex. Stars Julie Gonzalo, Chris McNally, Madeleine Arthur.

programme.title: Haul Out the Halloween
programme.desc: New, Halloween-obsessed neighbors inspire residents of Evergreen Lane to haul out their spookiest costumes and décor to become EverSCREAM Lane. Stars Lacey Chabert, Wes Brown, Stephen Tobolowsky, Melissa Peterman, Ellen Travolta.

programme.title: Wedding Season
programme.desc: Journalist Trish is on back-to-back bridesmaid duty for her three best friends. Finding herself without a date, she pairs up with photographer Ryan, the brother of her best friend. Stars Stephanie Bennett & Casey Deidrick.

programme.title: Raise a Glass to Love
programme.desc: Aspiring Master Sommelier Jenna returns to her family vineyard to study and is intrigued by the natural methods of the handsome new, Argentinian winemaker, Marcelo. Stars Laura Osnes, Juan Pablo Di Pace.

programme.title: The Wedding Cottage
programme.desc: A wedding guide creator must convince an uninspired artist and owner of a special wedding cottage to renovate the run down cottage to host a contest winning couple for their dream wedding. Starring Erin Krakow and Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Villa Amore
programme.desc: Liara goes to Italy and impulsively buys the villa where her parents met. She soon learns she is in way over her head and must ask a lawyer-turned-handyman to help her renovate. Stars Eloise Mumford, Kevin McGarry.

programme.title: Winter Castle
programme.desc: When Jenny attends a wedding at a magical ice hotel, she is surprised when she connects with the best man, Craig, and his daughter. Will the romance of the hotel bring them together? Stars Emilie Ullerup and Kevin McGarry.

programme.title: Taking a Shot at Love
programme.desc: Jenna, a former professional dancer, uses ballet to help a hockey player get back on the ice. Stars Alexa PenaVega and Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Polar Opposites
programme.desc: Emma needs to get to Antarctica to reach her father and travels to South America but can't get on a boat for the last leg. She sneaks onto a cruise ship and meets engineer Andy. Stars Rhiannon Fish and Markian Tarasiuk.

programme.title: A Summer Romance
programme.desc: Samantha's Montana ranch is her family's legacy, so when a developer shows up to buy it, Sam isn't interested. But as he tries to win her trust and her ranch, Sam finds he might also be winning her heart. Erin Krakow, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Two Tickets to Paradise
programme.desc: When two weddings are ruined by both the bride and groom getting left at the altar, they still decide to take their honeymoons, not knowing they are heading to the same resort in Hawaii. Stars Ashley Williams, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Caught by Love
programme.desc: While on a journey of self-discovery, a resort guest gets swept into an undercover investigation for stolen jewels that turns into an unexpected and adventurous romance. Starring Rachael Leigh Cook and Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Northern Lights of Christmas
programme.desc: Pilot Zoey has been working towards her goal of owning her own plane, but everything is thrown off course when she inherits a reindeer farm, along with the handsome ranch hand Alec. Stars Ashley Williams, Corey Sevier.

programme.title: A Christmas Angel Match
programme.desc: Monica, a Christmas angel, works to set couples up at the most wonderful time of year. That is, until Michael is assigned to the same couple and their differing tactics cause chaos. Starring Meghan Ory and Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: A Royal Queens Christmas
programme.desc: A prince finds his way to Queens during Christmas when a local woman enlists his help with a children's Christmas show. Stars Megan Park, Julian Morris.

programme.title: 'Tis the Season
programme.desc: When Kate's best friends sign her up for a holiday-themed dating service, she reluctantly joins, but has no idea just how much her life is about to change. Stars Mae Whitman, Julian Morris, Jane Seymour, and Mary McDonnell.

programme.title: A Make or Break Holiday
programme.desc: Liv and Daniel grow frustrated planning Christmas in their new home and agree to go on a break, but they must pretend to still be a happy couple as they host their families for Christmas. Starring Hunter King, and Evan Roderick.

programme.title: Christmas with the Darlings
programme.desc: When an assistant gives her final notice, she is drawn into helping the charming, younger brother of her wealthy boss as he looks after his orphaned nieces and nephew through Christmas. Stars Katrina Law and Carlo Marks.

programme.title: The More the Merrier
programme.desc: During a Christmas Eve blizzard, ER Doctor, Alice, and newly hired cardiologist, Brian, team up to deliver four babies while spreading holiday joy for the patients and hospital staff. Stars Rachel Boston, Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Deck the Halls on Cherry Lane
programme.desc: We're back for another Christmas on 7 Cherry Lane, this time in 1966, 1981, and 2000. Stars John Brotherton, Erin Cahill, Brooke D'Orsay, Chelsea Hobbs, Ben Hollingsworth, Sam Page.

programme.title: The Christmas Doctor
programme.desc: Zoey is a traveling doctor who prefers short assignments to staying put, so when she is assigned to a small town clinic for the holidays, she is surprised when she starts to feel at home. Stars Holly Robinson Peete, Adrian Holmes.

programme.title: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: Eric Randall, an author of bachelor lifestyle books, is left in charge of his niece and nephew for the holidays. Eric turns to his friend April, a lover of all things Christmas, for help. Stars Jesse Metcalfe and Fiona Gublemann.

programme.title: The Snow Must Go On
programme.desc: A former Broadway star agrees to direct his niece's high school Christmas musical in the hopes of impressing an influential Broadway producer. Stars Heather Hemmens, Corey Cott.

programme.title: Our Holiday Story
programme.desc: A loving couple shares the story of how they met and fell in love when their daughter's boyfriend comes to meet them for the first time at Christmas. Starring Nikki DeLoach and Warren Christie.

programme.title: A Royal Montana Christmas
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by her royal duties, Princess Victoria visits Big Sky Country for Christmas and meets her dashing guide at the ranch. She must decide if love is worth leaving her royal life behind. Fiona Gubelmann, Warren Christie.

programme.title: 'Tis the Season to Be Irish
programme.desc: Rose tries to flip a house in Ireland but is blocked by Sean, a handsome local who wants to preserve the historic cottage. Stars Fiona Gubelmann, Eion Macken.

programme.title: Home for Christmas Day
programme.desc: When a young woman falls in love and develops a long-distance relationship with a soldier in active duty, her protective mother tries her best to steer her daughter away from heartache.

programme.title: A Glenbrooke Christmas
programme.desc: Longing to be accepted for herself and not just her wealth, an heiress heads to the small town of Glenbrooke, where she discovers the joys of a simple Christmas, community, and maybe even love. Stars Autumn Reeser, Antonio Cupo.

programme.title: We Met in December
programme.desc: After a magical night sharing hopes, dreams, and a perfect kiss, strangers Annie and Dave lose each other with no way to connect. They embark on a quest to find each other by Christmas. Stars Autumn Reeser, Niall Matter.

programme.title: Cross Country Christmas
programme.desc: Former classmates Lina and Max are traveling home for the holidays, until a storm hits and they have to work together to make it home in time, no matter the mode of transportation. Stars Rachael Leigh Cook, Greyston Holt.

programme.title: The Sweetest Christmas
programme.desc: A struggling pastry chef must embrace the Christmas spirit or risk losing both the contest and a second chance at love. Stars Lacey Chabert and Lea Coco.

programme.title: Christmas Island
programme.desc: When a snowstorm diverts Kate's first private flight en route to Switzerland to Christmas Island, she must team up with an air traffic controller to secure her dream job as the family's pilot. Stars Rachel Skarsten, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Foiled Plans
programme.desc: Goldy Berry's Medieval feast at Hyde Castle gets interrupted by a murder. She teams up with Detective Shultz to solve the mystery before the murderer strikes again. Nikki DeLoach, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Goldy Berry caters a VIP concert and goes on a date with Tom. Starring Nikki DeLoach and Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Gilded Newport Mysteries: Murder at the Breakers
programme.desc: A society page writer in 1895 Rhode Island witnesses a murder while attending a ball at the Vanderbilt mansion and is drawn into the investigation when her brother is arrested. Stars Ali Skovbye, Danny Griffin, Nathan Witte.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Something New
programme.desc: Young Aurora Teagarden returns home to Lawrenceton after college to pursue her post-grad degree and finds herself embroiled in a mystery involving her friend Sally's fiancé. Stars Skyler Samuels, Evan Roderick, Marilu Henner.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: A Lesson in Murder
programme.desc: When a student from Aurora's true crime literature class is found murdered outside the diner where she works, Aurora takes it upon herself to figure out the real culprit. Stars Skyler Samuels, Evan Roderick, and Marilu Henner.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Death at the Diner
programme.desc: When the owner of the diner where Aurora Teagarden works is suddenly killed, her new boyfriend becomes the primary suspect! Stars Skyler Samuels, Evan Roderick and Marilu Henner.

programme.title: CrimeTime: Freefall
programme.desc: Crime series actress Hadley Warner retires to a small town where she encounters her first real case. Using her TV crime knowledge, she teams up with Detective Caden to solve the case. Starring Lyndie Greenwood, Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Pilot
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, English professor Amy uses her crime fiction expertise to unravel the case faster than detective Travis, who ends up working with Amy to catch the killer. Stars Jill Wagner, Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Playing Dead
programme.desc: The local theater is producing a mystery that crime fiction expert Amy unearthed. When one of the actress' life is threatened, Amy & Travis must uncover which character is playing for keeps. Stars Jill Wagner, Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Words Can Kill
programme.desc: When a guest at the college book festival is killed, Amy and Travis clash after he arrests an unlikely person for murder. Amy must fight to prove he's got the wrong person behind bars. Starring Jill Wagner and Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Dead Talk
programme.desc: Amy heads to Seattle to give a TED Talk-style lecture. When a tech genius dies, Amy suspects foul play. When local cops shut her out, Travis joins forces with Amy to figure out whodunit. Stars Jill Wagner, Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Mystery 101: An Education in Murder
programme.desc: A young writer's research prompts the police to revisit a famous murder case that convicted Amy's colleague at Elmstead, so Travis & Amy get a second chance at clearing the professor's name. Stars Jill Wagner & Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Killer Timing
programme.desc: An escaped serial killer and an attempt on Travis's life makes this their most dangerous case yet as Amy and Travis team up with his FBI agent ex to find the connection before it's too late. Stars Jill Wagner & Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Deadly History
programme.desc: Amy and Travis travel to New York to investigate after Amy's uncle goes missing, and the initial clues make them fear the worst. Stars Jill Wagner, Kristoffer Polaha, Robin Thomas.

programme.title: Cut, Color, Murder
programme.desc: When a beauty pageant creator is found dead, a savvy hairdresser works with the new detective in town and risks everything to clear the names of those she loves. Stars Julie Gonzalo, Ryan McPartlin.

programme.title: Jazz Ramsey: A K-9 Mystery
programme.desc: When JAZZ RAMSEY and her crime detection dog ZEUS stumble upon an old crime scene, the K9 trainer, her star pup, and ex-boyfriend and lead detective NICK are thrown into the investigation. Stars Rachel Skarsten, Corey Sevier.

programme.title: Sweet Revenge: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: As Hannah and Mike experience engaged life while balancing their busy careers, a murder at a 24-hour gym complicates their wedding planning. Stars Alison Sweeney, Cameron Mathison, Barbara Niven.

programme.title: Carrot Cake Murder: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: The discovery of a skeleton in an old building leads to a murder investigation. Alison Sweeney, Cameron Mathison, Gabriel Hogan, Barbara Niven.

programme.title: A Zest for Death: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah solves a murder while her relationship with Mike is on the rocks. Alison Sweeney, Cameron Mathison, Barbara Niven.

programme.title: One Bad Apple: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah meets a new side of law & order as she investigates a murder and crosses paths with by-the-books prosecuting attorney Chad Norton. Meanwhile, Delores has a secret. Stars Alison Sweeney, Victor Webster and Barbara Niven.
